headline: This Online Travel Powerhouse Should Crush Airbnb Over the Next Several Years

headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Airbnb, Raises Price Target to $153
summary: UBS  analyst Stephen Ju   maintains Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $149 to $153.
